[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:9世紀の文学]] [[ar:Category:أدب القرن 9]] [[az:Category:IX əsr ədəbiyyatı]] [[ba:Category:IX быуат әҙәбиәте]] [[be_x_old:Category:Літаратура IX стагодзьдзя]] [[be:Category:Літаратура IX стагоддзя]] [[bn:Category:৯ম শতাব্দীর সাহিত্য]] [[commons:Category:9th-century texts]] [[cs:Category:Literatura 9. století]] [[de:Category:Literatur (9. Jahrhundert)]] [[eo:Category:Literaturo de la 9-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Literatura del siglo IX]] [[fa:Category:ادبیات سده ۹ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:IXe siècle en littérature]] [[hi:Category:९वीं सदी का साहित्य]] [[hy:Category:9-րդ դարի գրականություն]] [[id:Category:Sastra abad ke-9]] [[ko:Category:9세기 문학]] [[mn:Category:9-р зууны утга зохиол]] [[nl:Category:9e-eeuwse literatuur]] [[pt:Category:Século IX na literatura]] [[ro:Category:Literatura secolului al IX-lea]] [[ru:Category:Литература IX века]] [[sh:Category:Književnost 9. vijeka]] [[sk:Category:Literatúra 9. storočia]] [[tg:Category:Адабиёти асри IX]] [[tr:Category:9. yüzyılda edebiyat]] [[tt:Category:IX гасыр әдәбияты]] [[uk:Category:Література IX століття]] [[ur:Category:نویں صدی کا ادب]] [[vi:Category:Văn học thế kỷ 9]] [[zh:Category:9世紀文學]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Category:9th-century_books]].

Jahrhundert)]] [[eo:Category:Literaturo de la 9-a jarcento]] [[es:Category:Literatura del siglo IX]] [[fa:Category:ادبیات سده ۹ (میلادی)]] [[fr:Category:IXe siècle en littérature]] [[hi:Category:९वीं सदी का साहित्य]] [[hy:Category:9-րդ դարի գրականություն]] [[id:Category:Sastra abad ke-9]] [[ko:Category:9세기 문학]] [[mn:Category:9-р зууны утга зохиол]] [[nl:Category:9e-eeuwse literatuur]] [[pt:Category:Século IX na literatura]] [[ro:Category:Literatura secolului al IX-lea]] [[ru:Category:Литература IX века]] [[sh:Category:Književnost 9. vijeka]] [[sk:Category:Literatúra 9. storočia]] [[tg:Category:Адабиёти асри IX]] [[tr:Category:9. yüzyılda edebiyat]] [[tt:Category:IX гасыр әдәбияты]] [[uk:Category:Література IX століття]] [[ur:Category:نویں صدی کا ادب]] [[vi:Category:Văn học thế kỷ 9]] [[zh:Category:9世紀文學]] [[en:Category:9th-century literature]] [[en:Category:9th-century literature]] {{translated page|ja|Category:9世紀の文学|version=76692849|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]]

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]] [[en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
